The '''''Nullifier-5''''' was a [[World Devastator]].

==History==
''Nullifier-5'' participated in the [[Battle of Calamari]].

During the battle, the ''Nullifier-5'' was severely damaged and crashed into [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari's]] watery surface near the [[Algae Sward]]. The burnt-out hulk sank to the ocean floor, where it became an artificial reef.
